backstory: Barnaby Crumblecrust was once a respected baker in a bustling city, famous for his sourdough. But constant disruptions and unruly customers turned his sweet disposition sour. He now travels, using his arcane knowledge not just for perfect proofing, but to ensure peace and quiet, often with a stern word or a well-placed arcane ward. His massive rolling pin is less for baking now, more for intimidation.
equipment: Scholar's pack (backpack, book of lore, ink, ink pen, parchment, sand, small knife)
Letter of introduction from the local Baker's Guild

features_traits.name: Darkvision
features_traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

features_traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
features_traits.description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

features_traits.name: Keen Senses
features_traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

features_traits.name: Fey Ancestry
features_traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

features_traits.name: Trance
features_traits.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day. The DM can let you gain the benefits of a long rest by doing this.

features_traits.name: High Elf Cantrip
features_traits.description: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list (Chill Touch).

features_traits.name: Spellcasting
features_traits.description: You can cast wizard spells, using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability (Spell Save DC 17, Spell Attack Modifier +9).

features_traits.name: Arcane Recovery
features_traits.description: Once per day, you can regain expended spell slots equal to half your wizard level (rounded up, max 5th level) during a short rest.

features_traits.name: Abjuration Savant
features_traits.description: The gold and time you must spend to copy an Abjuration spell into your spellbook is halved.

features_traits.name: Arcane Ward
features_traits.description: When you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, you can create a ward that has hit points equal to twice your wizard level + your Intelligence modifier (2x9 + 5 = 23 HP).

features_traits.name: Projected Ward
features_traits.description: When a creature you can see within 30 feet of you takes damage, you can use your reaction to interpose your Arcane Ward between the attacker and the target. The damage is dealt to your ward instead of the target.

features_traits.name: Spell Mastery
features_traits.description: Choose one 1st-level wizard spell (Shield) and one 2nd-level wizard spell (Misty Step) from your spellbook. You can cast those spells at their lowest level without expending a spell slot. If you want to cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot as normal.

features_traits.name: Guild Membership
features_traits.description: You are a member of a guild of artisans. You can secure aid and identification from your guild, and have access to a network of contacts.
